title: Redstone Sound Slider
description: Adjust your piston / dispenser / trapdoor / buildstone volume separately from other blocks.
body:
![Picture of the default Minecraft settings, but with an extra 'Redstone' slider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tcswzSAY/images/2132e93b8a6b3def2ff9e5732a5d201bf0b22b71.png)

Redstone Sound Slider adds, well, a slider to your sound settings specifically for redstone! That's it. Really.

You can configure what the slider controls in the config screen, including, but not limited to, trapdoors, doors, pressure plates, minecarts, fence gates, dispensers, pistons and more!
